# Construction Project Operations Reference Pack

## Summary
Instantiates the platform for construction operations workflows such as RFIs, submittals, reporting, and meeting-action coordination.

## Extracted Preview
> Ruh.ai V1 Reference Pack Definition Construction Project Operations Pack
> Reusable digital employees for RFI coordination, submittals, document control, reporting, and action tracking across general contractors and specialty contractors
> This document instantiates the platform PRD, V1 system design, API contract, and employee pack specification as a concrete industry pack. The goal is to define one horizontal pack that can be configured for many construction firms instead of rebuilding niche one-off workflows for each customer.
> What this pack must accomplish
> Take repetitive, document-heavy project operations work off project engineers, coordinators, and PMs.
> Operate above the customer's existing system of record instead of replacing PMIS and document systems.
> Keep all material external actions behind governed approval rules, citations, and full audit history.
> Stay horizontal enough to fit many contractors, while still reflecting real construction nouns and workflows.
> Document facts
> Pack ID: ref.construction.project-ops
> Reference version: 1.0.0
> Pack type: Industry reference pack
> Primary deployment model: One tenant trust boundary; one workspace per project
> Conforms to: Ruh.ai V1 Employee Pack Specification
> 
> Outcome area
> Problems removed
> Primary workflows
> Business measures
> Project correspondence
> Work enters through scattered email, chat, PMIS alerts, and file drops with no consistent triage.
> Signal intake and routing
> Response time, unassigned signal count
> Design coordination
> Questions are repeated, poorly sourced, or delayed because current drawings/specs are hard to assembl...
